name: Synthflow
description: Synthflow — No-code AI voice agent builder for automating phone calls with natural conversation flows.

seo.title: Synthflow — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Synthflow: Synthflow — No-code AI voice agent builder for automating phone calls with natural conversation flows.

when_to_use: Deploying no-code AI voice agents for phone-based use cases
Building outbound calling automation without writing voice code
Creating AI receptionists and appointment scheduling agents
Integrating voice AI with CRMs via Synthflow's webhook system

pros: Handles inbound and outbound phone flows
cons: Quality gap vs custom LiveKit/Vocode stacks
review.verdict: Quick path to a working voice agent for SMBs, but serious call centers will outgrow the no-code ceiling.
review.best_for: SMB sales and support teams launching their first AI phone agent
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep customization, analytics or sub-second latency targets
